text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'll go... and get the star.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: Uh... I'm sorry, but how?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can handle snow. Tell me where the star is, and I'll go down the
mountain and get it.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! N-no, you don't need to go through all that trouble! We
can still have the party without it!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But the kids—that star's really important to them. So we do need it for the party.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me for saying it, but you aren't known for your sense of
direction... And I must admit it's far too dangerous for me to go out
there with you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm better at directions in the mountains than I am in the big city. I'll
be fine. Be right back.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: W-w-w-wait a second, please! I haven't even told you where to go!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Is everything all right? We could hear you all the way from our cabin...

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide?! What are you—no, never mind! I need your help.
Please stop Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see. So that's what happened.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's not so dangerous right now. And you know we have the strength
to run on a snowy mountain.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I'm clumsy with words, so I can't make them feel at ease... Would
you explain it to them?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, but I cannot. I agree with your fans about this.

text_block_list.name: Oguri & Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's true that you can get through this snow if you take on a small
amount of risk. However small though, a risk is still a risk... It's
dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Think about it. On the off chance that you're hurt, how will your fans
feel? What would they do?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I... well...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oguri, you asked me before what I thought you should give to them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What could make everyone happy and is also something you're
capable of giving? I believe the answer already lies within you, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We've no choice now but for me to tell you. The answer... is yourself.
That's what I wanted to convey to you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Myself?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You want to be Santa today, but that's exactly what your
party-givers are trying to do for you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Their desire is to give you all the support you need. It's as simple as
that. And you, the object of their adoration, are trying to repay them
in turn.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't your intention alone make the most heartwarming present?
The star of the party needn't do anything reckless.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: Hayahide's exactly right. We're all so thankful for the care you've shown us.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
If you'll just be here with us and enjoy the party, even the children
will understand. So, please...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It'd be bad to make everyone worry. I... I guess... I
shouldn't...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What about you, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, what about what she wants to do? Oguri wants to make them
happy by doing something herself. Isn't that important?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So what if her intentions are good enough? Oguri doesn't just want to do enough for her fans. Sometimes you wanna give or do something... more special.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So I think we should let Oguri do what she wants. And stop telling her
to just... be here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A present... shouldn't be something that's so simple to give.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Put more explicitly, simply having you two here is enough for me. So I may have been overenthusiastic about doing everything myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Taishin... That's right. I want to return everyone's well-wishes
in... my own way.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's just one kid who's sad, I want to make them smile. I can't...
back down from a challenge. I... want to do what I can.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I understand how you feel. But in our current predicament, I must
insist that going out to get the star is too dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
From my grasp of it, the star is quite large. Even if you were to make
it down the mountain, it would be incredibly difficult to carry it back
up by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Taishin and I would help... but we're inexperienced with the snowy
terrain. I'm afraid we'd be more of a hindrance to you. If we had some
other means...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... well...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No need to worry about that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You two! ...Did you come for the party?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
No, silly! We said we're looking for holiday miracles! And Marvey's
radar was pinging like crazy in this direction!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! My marvelous sixth sense has brought us together again! ☆ But
that's not all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: We can help you with something marvelous. ☆ 'Cause it's smooth sailing to move big stuff around in that! ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You know what that means... It's time for takeoff, Oguri! ♪
